title: HydroPhobic
description: Makes all entities allergic to water
body:
# HYDROPHOBIC!

![Official Title!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f104ba6fdb592272c4b9108369b0af261dfc993.png)

Hydrophobic is a Datapack that **IS NOT MEANT FOR ACTUAL USE**
This is a fun challenge that makes it so water will hurt you for 1 heart! (True Damage) If you want you could sneak this onto a server you have acess to server file like a little evil person you are! (PLEASE DONT D OTHIS AND ANY SERVER EFFECTED BY THIS DATAPACK I HAVE NOTHING TO DO WITH!!!)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uQ0o_Kc354c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![this is a modified version of 'No Gen AI' Seal ( https://www.polygon-treehouse.com/no-gen-ai-seal ) for Datapacks  This assures that I used NO AI in the creation of this Datapack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f9e74e29cb9218b22d3a5721c7b9556e1c2364.png)
